text.tspan: A compact glycolytic oscillator whose fixed point is stable, then unstable, then stable again as the
drive parameter crosses a finite Hopf band.
The arrows show the local flow.
The colored curves show where one derivative
Trajectories reveal whether the fixed point
attracts, spirals, or closes into an orbit.

svg.text: Generated from a standard-library Python gallery: vector field + nullclines + trajectories.
